titleStmt.title: SII 38.283: original edition by S. Swaminathan
No. 283. (A.R. No. 283 of 1912.) ŚIVANKŪḌAL, KANCHIPURAM TALUK, CHINGLEPUT DISTRICT. On the south wall, central shrine, Śivakoḻunḍīśvara temple.

summary.p: Damaged and is lightly engraved. It records that the mahasabhaiyār of Śivankūḍal and (veḷḷaḷas) sold three hundred kuḻi of land in two pieces, to the god, Mahādēvar Śivakoḻundāṇḍār, after the receipt of the money from the temple authorities, for burning two perpetual lamps. The land was also freed from taxes such as antārāyam, echchōṟu, kūṟṟunel and others. Vēḷān Tiruviṇṇagar Niṉṟāṉ, the madhyastha figures as signatory. It is stated at the end that one Raṅgaraiyan Kalinambi instituted this charity.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . tripuvanacakkaravatti śrīvikkiramacoḻa
devaṟku yāṇṭu pattāvatu jayaṅkoṇṭacoḻa
maṇṭalattu Ūṟṟukkāṭṭu
ṭṭuc civankūṭal mahāsabhaiyomum Ivvūr ve
mum Eṅkaḷur mahādevarcivakkoḻun=taṇṭāṟku Āti
śaṇḍeśvaradevar pakkal vilaikoṇṭu vi
ṭutta nilam kamalanārāyaṇapputteri paḷḷamā
l vaḻi nirpāyum puḷḷakkālāl nirpāyu
ḻpāṟkellai vi kāṟukku meṟkum
tenpāṟkellai Iḷāṉa vāṇṭukkam Iṭai maṇṇi
ceṟuvukku vaṭakku melpāṟkellai Itan ttiya
ponkuṉṟukkuk kiḻakkum vaṭapāṟkellai kiḻ
vatikkut teṟkum Inṉānkellaikkuḷ naṭupaṭṭa nilamāvatu
kāṇikkāl kuḻi 100 8 10patum Itan kiḻai Erukuḻi poki taṭi Oṉ
ṟiṉāṟk kuḻi 100 2 10patu Āka muṉṉūṟum tiru[nan=tāvi]ḷakku Iraṇṭu E
rippatākavum Innilañcuṭṭivan=ta An=tarāyamum Eccoṟu kūṟṟune
llum Epperppaṭṭa koyilvācalponta nāṅka
ḷe Iṟuttum Ittanmam vaḻuvāmāṟc celuttakkaṭavomānom civan
kūṭal mahāsabhaiyomum Ivvūr veḷā �mum Ittanmattukku
virotam paṇṇuvār keṅkaiiṭaik kumariiṭaic ceytār cey
ta pāvattaippaṭuvār Ivarkaḷ paṇiyāleḻuti neṉ maddhyasthan veḷā
n tiruviṇṇakar niṉṟāneṉ Ivaienneḻuttu Ittanmam cetāṉ
raṅkaraiyan kali nampi civankūṭalkkuṇṇa ṉ
svastiśrī .
Digital edition of SII 38.283 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
